title: Nexus One
description: An intelligent institutional management system developed for RNA University. It features secure role-based login portals for Admin, Teacher, and Student, alongside an integrated emergency blood finder module for quick donor matching.

title: Bank Management System
description: A complete banking management system built with C++. It utilizes file handling to securely store user account details, balances, and transaction records in local text files.

title: My Portfolio
description: A premium personal portfolio with MacOS/Apple-like UI and glassmorphism aesthetics. Features a dark cyberpunk theme, animated canvas background, and a stacked card deck project showcase.
